headline: Monday reset: rows and discipline, not snacks
summary: You're 528 days behind because -0.23 kg/week won't work; today you must execute a -0.60 kg/week deficit with discipline.
details: Today: eat only portioned Huel and whole foods—zero snacking, zero emotional eating. Get on the rowing machine for 45 minutes (targets ~3000 kJ deficit). You're 528 days behind because slow pace doesn't cut it; this week's discipline determines if you catch up or keep falling back.
